docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF YOUNG, SHI YU
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 28026, RECORD TRANSFERRED
ABOUT 4:57 PM,CALLED DEFT, RE:$22.00 CASH NOTGIVEN LEFT W/PAPERS;NO PHONE ANSWERING SRVC;MAILEDLETTER RE:$22.00 FILING FEE,DID NOT SEE HIM OUTSIDE BLDG.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF YOUNG, SHI YU

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT MCGILL, TERRY L. DEFENDANT WAIVES DEFECTIVE SERVICE. PER CALIFORNIA BUSINESS AND PROFESSTIONS CODE SECTION 7031, NO CONTRACTOR MAY BRING AN ACTION TO RECOVER COMPENSATION FOR WORK REQUIRING A LICENSE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT MCGILL, TERRY L. RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT YOUNG, SHI YU $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $42.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,042.00, CROSS-DEFENDANT WAIVES DEFECTIVE SUBSTITUTED SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
